story.text:
# 💡 C86 · Obstruction-Theoretic Amnesia
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Grade-2 forgetting = a non-vanishing obstruction class to gluing local agent views into a global witness; Grade-1 = vanishing class with withheld gluing data. Amnesia is the only defense term independent of t. Cross-linked C73. Active (30% · Run 4).

## Edges in

- [[C73 · Terminal-Obstruction Primitive]] *relates_to* →
- [[C91 · Gödel ↔ Φ_agent]] *relates_to* →
